basic.name: Shark Bite
basic.effect: Bites the enemy. 20% chance to apply Bleed (2 turns).

special.name: Tidal Chomp
special.effect: A brutal chomp. Deals bonus damage if target is Bleeding.

defense.name: Fin Flick Evade
defense.effect: Evades the next attack (60% chance).

ultimate.name: Megalodon Rush
ultimate.effect: Devastating shark rush. Applies Fear (enemy damage -20% for 2 turns).

basic.name: Bat Bonk
basic.effect: Bonks the enemy with a bat.

special.name: Triple Tung Smash
special.effect: 3-hit combo. Each hit has 15% chance to Stun (1 turn).

defense.name: Sahur Block
defense.effect: Blocks the next attack and counters for small damage.

ultimate.name: Midnight Sahur Slam
ultimate.effect: Huge bat slam. Guaranteed Stun (1 turn).

special.name: Spin Slash
special.effect: Graceful spinning strike. 30% chance to Dodge next hit.

defense.name: Curtain Step
defense.effect: Evades next attack (55% chance).

ultimate.name: Grand Finale Dance
ultimate.effect: Massive performance attack. Boosts own attack for 2 turns.

special.name: Brainrot Blast
special.effect: Deals damage and applies Confuse (1 turn).

defense.name: Cringe Guard
defense.effect: Reduces incoming damage by 50% this turn.

ultimate.name: Absolute Brainrot
ultimate.effect: Massive damage. 25% chance to Stun (1 turn).

basic.name: Croc Snap
basic.effect: Quick bite. 15% chance to Bleed (2 turns).

special.name: Swamp Roll
special.effect: Death roll attack. Ignores 30% defense.

defense.name: Scale Armor
defense.effect: Reduces damage taken by 40% for 2 turns.

ultimate.name: Bombardment Roll
ultimate.effect: Explosive roll. Deals AoE damage (if multi-enemy).

special.name: Latte Whirl
special.effect: Spins coffee foam, reducing enemy accuracy (2 turns).

defense.name: Foam Shield
defense.effect: Absorbs 35 damage.

ultimate.name: Caffeine Overdrive
ultimate.effect: Massive burst. Increases own speed (extra turn chance) for 2 turns.
